title: Profile: Editor
summary: Editor preferences for the current user.

sections.title: Autosave mode
sections.markdown:
- **Enabled**: autosave is on for this user
- **Disabled**: autosave is off for this user
- **Inherit site default**: follows the current site setting shown in the field label

sections.title: Autosave interval override
sections.markdown: If set, this value overrides the site autosave interval for this user. Leave it blank to keep the current inherited interval.

sections.title: What autosave stores
sections.markdown: Autosave updates your private draft. It does not publish content and it does not create a revision.
